Pricing

Monetize after the core flow works

The UI is present now, but payment should stay secondary until upload, analysis, and matching are stable.

import { Component } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-pricing', templateUrl: './pricing.component.html' }) export class PricingComponent { readonly plans = [ { name: 'Free', price: '₹0', description: 'One resume analysis for first-time users.', features: ['1 resume upload', 'ATS score', 'Basic suggestions'] }, { name: 'Resume Pro', price: '₹99', description: 'Detailed resume improvement suggestions.', features: ['Detailed summary rewrite', 'Improved bullet points', 'Keyword guidance'] }, { name: 'Match Pro', price: '₹199', description: 'Resume analysis plus role matching.', features: ['Everything in Resume Pro', 'Job matches', 'Missing skills tracking'] }, { name: 'Career Pack', price: '₹299', description: 'Full bundle for applications.', features: ['Resume + job matching', 'Cover letter support later', 'Job email templates later'] } ]; }
